ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "rownumber" INTEGER /* Row number of the data point */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the data point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the data point */,
  "productivity" REAL /* Productivity value at the data point */,
  "rugg" REAL /* Rugg value at the data point */,
  "pop" REAL /* Population density at the data point */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP value at the data point */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate at the data point */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Economic sector associated with the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic metric */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES economic_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, census) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., productivity, population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial coordinate */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the geospatial coordinate */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the geospatial coordinate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the coordinate is located */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the coordinate in meters */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the coordinate in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_coordinates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., regression, correlation) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for the analysis */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES economic_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., scatter plot, bar chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being annotated */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-authorship, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being commented on */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being commented on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)
